title: ASCII Sequence Renderer Modularization
problem: The ASCII sequence renderer is a monolithic module, which makes future sequence control-block rendering riskier than necessary.

evidence.result: opened modularization lane and selected no-behavior model/validation extraction as the first task
extracted internal sequence model and unsupported-feature validation into dedicated modules with focused gates passing
extracted participant layout and lifecycle visibility helpers into sequence/layout.rs with focused and package gates passing
split sequence render orchestration, events, notes, boxes, and text helpers into owner modules with focused and package gates passing
documented final module boundary and confirmed sequence control blocks remain follow-on scope
closed modularization lane and split sequence control blocks into follow-on scope

continue_policy.notes: ascii-sequence-renderer-modularization is closed. Open sequence-control-blocks if control-block rendering is the next priority.
